pi_items.source: bahmni_seed_manifest.json entry #4 confirms patient 'Fatima Al-Hassan' was successfully created with identifier BAH000005; seed_bahmni.py line 35 includes this patient in PATIENT_DATA
bahmni_seed_manifest.json line 44: Fatima Al-Hassan created with identifier='BAH000005' and patient_uuid='2c8092db-2d27-49f5-b127-8ffa75a9ce79'
Task description line 'Patient name: Fatima Al-Hassan' implies search query 'Fatima' is appropriate for finding this patient; task setup script line 17 references BAH000005 by identifier

Task description explicitly states 'Bahmni is open at the login screen'; task uses OpenMRS REST API (confirmed in task_utils.sh lines 314-332); Bahmni is a real, open-source hospital management system deployed globally with millions of patient records

Task description explicitly states 'Username: superman' and 'Password: Admin123'; confirmed in setup_bahmni.sh (lines 14-15), task_utils.sh (lines 13-14), seed_bahmni.py (lines 226-228), and bahmni_seed_manifest.json (lines 199-200) as default test credentials for Bahmni demo/test environments

seed_bahmni.py line 6 states: 'Patient data is based on real demographic distributions from public health datasets. Names are drawn from US Census Bureau popular names data.' All 20 patients are fictional test data created by the seed script, not real patient records. bahmni_seed_manifest.json documents 19 successfully seeded patients out of 20 attempted (Amara Okonkwo failed to create)
seed_bahmni.py line 35: PATIENT_DATA includes ('Fatima', 'Al-Hassan', 'F', 1965); bahmni_seed_manifest.json line 43 confirms birth_year: 1965 in created patient record
seed_bahmni.py line 35 specifies gender 'F' for Fatima; bahmni_seed_manifest.json line 42 confirms gender: 'F' in created patient record

privileged_info_summary: Fatima Al-Hassan is a fully synthetic female patient created by seed_bahmni.py as test data for Bahmni (OpenMRS), with identifier BAH000005 and birth year 1965. The patient was successfully seeded into the system as evidenced by bahmni_seed_manifest.json (created 2026-02-17). The task requires an agent to log in with test credentials (superman/Admin123) to the Bahmni hospital management system and search for this patient by name ('Fatima'), then open her full patient profile. All patient data is fictional, derived from US Census Bureau public name data, and exists only in this containerized test/demo environment.
